name: Gamdias ATHENA M4M mini ITX, mATX, micro mesh small form factor PC case, includes 3 PWM fans (Airflow up to 57.56 CFM), fits: 395mm GPU, ATX PSU, and 360mm radiators.
shortName: Gamdias ATHENA M4M mini ITX, mATX, micro mesh small form factor PC
description: Mini ITX small form factor case with mesh design supporting large GPUs and 360mm radiators.
